scenarios.description: Valid power-of-two length array sets scores and computes correct height (length=8)
scenarios.precondition: miniMax = new MiniMaxAlgorithm(); initial scores retained from constructor
scenarios.expectedResult: miniMax.getScores() equals the provided array [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8]; miniMax.getHeight() == 3

scenarios.description: Invalid non-power-of-two length array prints warning and retains original state (length=3)
scenarios.precondition: miniMax = new MiniMaxAlgorithm(); capture originalScores and originalHeight
scenarios.expectedResult: System.out contains "The number of scores must be a power of 2."; miniMax.getScores() equals originalScores; miniMax.getHeight() equals originalHeight
pseudocode: assert getStdOut().contains("The number of scores must be a power of 2.");

scenarios.description: Null input throws NullPointerException before validation
scenarios.expectedResult: throws NullPointerException; no modification of scores or height
